## ExtractPayload type

Extracts the payload from any function with a single parameter.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export declare type ExtractPayload<SomeFunction> = SomeFunction extends (payload?: any) => any ? Parameters<SomeFunction>[0] : never;
```
